title: ROMANIA enforcement action against PREMIER RESTAURANTS ROMANIA SRL (8,000)
summary: Insufficient technical and organisational measures to ensure information security The Romanian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 8,000 on PREMIER RESTAURANTS ROMANIA SRL. The controller failed to implement adequate technical and organisational measures, resulting in a cyber incident. Legal basis: Art. 28 (1) GDPR, Art. 32 (1) b), (2) GDPR.
dedupKey: romania enforcement action against premier restaurants romania srl 8 000|2026-01-13
